arts.ttl: Paul Merson sends Everton brutal new manager verdict after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho was linked with the Everton job before Sean Dyche's sacking at Goodison Park on Wednesday afternoon.

arts.ttl: David Moyes in talks over remarkable return to Everton after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Moyes was previously in charge at Goodison Park between 2002 and 2013

arts.ttl: The Friedkin Group have already made Jose Mourinho feelings clear amid Everton manager links
arts.sum: The latest Everton news as the Toffees are on the search for a new manager following the dismissal of Sean Dyche just hours before the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche's Everton axe clears way for David Moyes to make final journey to spiritual home
arts.sum: The timing looked odd but The Friedkin Group have acted decisively and a former manager now seems an obvious choice to spearhead the owners' bold, new era

arts.ttl: Moyes in contention for Everton return after Dyche sacked
arts.sum: David Moyes is a contender for the vacant managerial position at Everton, Sky Sports News understands, after Sean Dyche was sacked on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Everton owners already have new manager in mind after sacking Sean Dyche
arts.sum: The Toffees have won just one of their last 11 Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: When Everton plan to announce David Moyes as new manager as he agrees to return
arts.sum: David Moyes has agreed to become the new Everton manager 🚨🔙

arts.ttl: Sources: Moyes in line to replace Dyche at Everton
arts.sum: David Moyes is the frontrunner to return to Everton and replace Sean Dyche as manager, sources have told ESPN, with the 61-year-old the favoured candidate of the club's new owners to steer the team away from relegation danger.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho has already given Everton verdict on Premier League return after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Everton sacking Sean Dyche has seen Jose Mourinho installed as one of the early favourites to become their new manager months after speaking about a hypothetical Premier League return

arts.ttl: Everton owners' reason for rejecting Jose Mourinho as David Moyes set for emotional return
arts.sum: Everton have sacked Sean Dyche and former Toffees boss David Moyes is their top target to replace him, with Jose Mourinho not in contention for a Premier League return
